scQCenrich 0.0.0.9004
  • Reference
    • QC_with_scQCenrich

Safe wrapper around AddModuleScore that returns the appended column names

dot-add_module_score_safe.Rd

Safe wrapper around AddModuleScore that returns the appended column names

Usage

.add_module_score_safe(
  obj,
  features,
  assay,
  name = "MS__",
  nbin = 24,
  ctrl = 100,
  debug_dir = NULL
)

Developed by Yuanyuan Liu.
